nodes.label: Autoload Hierarchy (four fixed autoloads: GameState, ApiClient, AudioManager, ScreenEffects)
nodes.norm_label: autoload hierarchy (four fixed autoloads: gamestate, apiclient, audiomanager, screeneffects)

nodes.label: ApiClient autoload (all HTTP calls, emits typed signals per RPC)
nodes.norm_label: apiclient autoload (all http calls, emits typed signals per rpc)

nodes.label: GameState autoload (session data: token, round, gold, life, triumph, item lists)
nodes.norm_label: gamestate autoload (session data: token, round, gold, life, triumph, item lists)

nodes.label: AudioManager autoload (BGM cross-fade, SFX load-on-demand cache, bus filter control)
nodes.norm_label: audiomanager autoload (bgm cross-fade, sfx load-on-demand cache, bus filter control)

nodes.label: ScreenEffects autoload (camera shake, white flash, screen overlay effects)
nodes.norm_label: screeneffects autoload (camera shake, white flash, screen overlay effects)

nodes.label: Network Layer Signal Contract (ApiClient signals, rpc_name_completed/failed naming)
nodes.norm_label: network layer signal contract (apiclient signals, rpc_name_completed/failed naming)

nodes.label: Item State Ownership (client owns placement coords; server authoritative on bench contents)
nodes.norm_label: item state ownership (client owns placement coords; server authoritative on bench contents)

nodes.label: CombatLogPlayer (queue + timer pattern, 0.10s tick interval, 2-frame hit-stop on crit)
nodes.norm_label: combatlogplayer (queue + timer pattern, 0.10s tick interval, 2-frame hit-stop on crit)

nodes.label: Synergy Glow Shader (synergy_glow.gdshader, glow_intensity uniform from modifier_pct)
nodes.norm_label: synergy glow shader (synergy_glow.gdshader, glow_intensity uniform from modifier_pct)

nodes.label: Export Variables Pattern (every designer-tunable constant must be @export)
nodes.norm_label: export variables pattern (every designer-tunable constant must be @export)

nodes.label: Game UI Skill (juice & presentation contract pointer)
nodes.norm_label: game ui skill (juice & presentation contract pointer)

nodes.label: Juice & Presentation Contract (authoritative client-side design spec, juice_manual.md)
nodes.norm_label: juice & presentation contract (authoritative client-side design spec, juice_manual.md)

nodes.label: UI Layout Paradigm (dark-first bento-grid, glassmorphic panels banned on live numbers)
nodes.norm_label: ui layout paradigm (dark-first bento-grid, glassmorphic panels banned on live numbers)

nodes.label: Elastic Easing & Tweens (no LINEAR; TRANS_ELASTIC overshoot on all scale/position/rotation)
nodes.norm_label: elastic easing & tweens (no linear; trans_elastic overshoot on all scale/position/rotation)

nodes.label: Shop Card Roll Pop (0->1.1->1.0 scale, TRANS_ELASTIC, 0.04s stagger per card)
nodes.norm_label: shop card roll pop (0->1.1->1.0 scale, trans_elastic, 0.04s stagger per card)

nodes.label: Drag-and-Drop Tilt (velocity-based rotation clamp, 0.65 lerp lag, TRANS_SPRING on drop)
nodes.norm_label: drag-and-drop tilt (velocity-based rotation clamp, 0.65 lerp lag, trans_spring on drop)

nodes.label: Grid Snap Bounce (Y-squish 1.0->0.75->1.05->1.0, teal CPUParticles2D ring on valid placement)
nodes.norm_label: grid snap bounce (y-squish 1.0->0.75->1.05->1.0, teal cpuparticles2d ring on valid placement)

nodes.label: Shader Synergy Glows (fragment shader neon plasma gradient, glow_intensity from modifier_pct, 2Hz cycle)
nodes.norm_label: shader synergy glows (fragment shader neon plasma gradient, glow_intensity from modifier_pct, 2hz cycle)

nodes.label: Combat Log Visual Interpretation Layer (queue + 0.10s timer, sprite lunge, hit-stop, screen shake)
nodes.norm_label: combat log visual interpretation layer (queue + 0.10s timer, sprite lunge, hit-stop, screen shake)

nodes.label: Screen Shake Severity (damage/max_hp * BASE_SCALAR 12.0, 2.5x on crit, 1-frame white flash)
nodes.norm_label: screen shake severity (damage/max_hp * base_scalar 12.0, 2.5x on crit, 1-frame white flash)

nodes.label: Floating Damage Indicators (-15 to +15 degree arc, 1.8x crit scale, crimson outline on crit)
nodes.norm_label: floating damage indicators (-15 to +15 degree arc, 1.8x crit scale, crimson outline on crit)

nodes.label: Soundscapes & Acoustic Architecture (audio = 50% perceived weight, events triggered by server fields)
nodes.norm_label: soundscapes & acoustic architecture (audio = 50% perceived weight, events triggered by server fields)

nodes.label: BGM Tracks (two 30-45s loops; prep/shop dark synthwave, combat percussive chiptune; 0.8s cross-fade)
nodes.norm_label: bgm tracks (two 30-45s loops; prep/shop dark synthwave, combat percussive chiptune; 0.8s cross-fade)

nodes.label: SFX Event Matrix (14 events: shop reroll, synergy link, grid snap, drag pickup, melee/ranged/arcane fire, crit, shield absorb, hp loss, fatal hp, triple-merge, win, triumph)
nodes.norm_label: sfx event matrix (14 events: shop reroll, synergy link, grid snap, drag pickup, melee/ranged/arcane fire, crit, shield absorb, hp loss, fatal hp, triple-merge, win, triumph)

nodes.norm_label: asset sourcing guide (sonniss gdc free, opengameart cc0, itch.io bundles, budget rs 15k-30k)

nodes.norm_label: implementation checklist (14-item verification gate before marking any scene complete)

nodes.label: Project Syn-Grid Juice Aesthetic Spec (PDF design reference)
nodes.norm_label: project syn-grid juice aesthetic spec (pdf design reference)

nodes.label: freq may be a scalar or a per-sample array (for sweeps/vibrato).
nodes.norm_label: freq may be a scalar or a per-sample array (for sweeps/vibrato).

nodes.label: Exponential frequency ramp, natural for pitch drops/rises.
nodes.norm_label: exponential frequency ramp, natural for pitch drops/rises.

nodes.label: One-pole lowpass; cutoff may be a scalar or per-sample array (sweeps).
nodes.norm_label: one-pole lowpass; cutoff may be a scalar or per-sample array (sweeps).

nodes.label: Karplus-Strong plucked string - the bow twang.
nodes.norm_label: karplus-strong plucked string - the bow twang.

nodes.label: High-freq wooden dice clatter + mechanical metallic notch.
nodes.norm_label: high-freq wooden dice clatter + mechanical metallic notch.

nodes.label: Rising synth chime; pitch_scale ascends further per modifier_pct.
nodes.norm_label: rising synth chime; pitch_scale ascends further per modifier_pct.

nodes.label: Melee strike + heavy pitched-down impact overtone (contract: layered).
nodes.norm_label: melee strike + heavy pitched-down impact overtone (contract: layered).

nodes.label: Dense low-freq iron chime with a distinct ring-out trail.
nodes.norm_label: dense low-freq iron chime with a distinct ring-out trail.

nodes.label: Soft thud - pitched-down cousin of the melee strike.
nodes.norm_label: soft thud - pitched-down cousin of the melee strike.

nodes.label: Sub-bass drop; the BGM LPF sweep is applied live by AudioManager.
nodes.norm_label: sub-bass drop; the bgm lpf sweep is applied live by audiomanager.

nodes.label: Dark synthwave, 80 BPM, 12 bars = 36s seamless loop (contract: 30-45s).
nodes.norm_label: dark synthwave, 80 bpm, 12 bars = 36s seamless loop (contract: 30-45s).

nodes.label: Percussive chiptune / synthwave, 128 BPM, 16 bars = 30s seamless loop.
